name: secured-source expansion: the DoD NIST SRE and OpenTelemetry authorities are secured in the engineering catalog
command: grep -q aws-dod-scca-prescriptive "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-engineering-sources.yaml" && grep -q nist-800-53 "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-engineering-sources.yaml" && grep -q google-sre-book "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-engineering-sources.yaml" && grep -q opentelemetry-docs "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/cloud-engineering-sources.yaml" && echo secured-core 1>&2
